The wallet card provided at registration contains the info your loved one needs to contact us.'},{question:"Can someone access my will while I'm still living?",answer:'No. We have strict verification procedures in place. No one can access your will while you are living without your direct authorization.'},{question:"How do I update my will after it's stored?",answer:"Simply walk in or mail your updated will to our facility.
